name: Mobile Gold Silver Exchange
description_short: Mobile Gold Silver Exchange buys gold, silver, and jewelry for instant cash at two DFW-area locations. They offer on-the-spot payment without checks.
description_long:
Mobile Gold Silver Exchange is a precious metals and jewelry buyer operating in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex with two physical locations in Haltom City and Fort Worth, Texas. The company specializes in purchasing unwanted gold and silver items directly from consumers in exchange for immediate cash payment.

The company offers cash purchases for gold jewelry, silver jewelry, coins, and other precious metals. They position themselves as an alternative to traditional pawn shops by emphasizing expert evaluation, fair pricing, and instant payment. According to their website, they accept items regardless of condition—old, broken, or new—and claim to provide competitive offers. A notable service distinction is their advertised after-hours availability, though specific hours for this service are not detailed on the website.

Mobile Gold Silver Exchange differentiates itself primarily through their claim of paying cash on the spot (rather than checks) and their positioning as expert evaluators who educate customers about their items' value. They emphasize treating items "like it's our own" and highlight professional service across their two convenient locations. The company operates extended hours, open 10am-7pm Monday-Saturday and 10am-6pm Sunday.

As a precious metals buyer, this business model is straightforward: customers receive immediate cash for items at market-based rates. The primary consumer consideration is that precious metals prices fluctuate, and individual evaluations determine final offer amounts. The company provides no third-party reviews or transparent pricing methodology visible on their website, which is typical for this business type but represents a transparency gap for consumers unfamiliar with spot prices.
address: 4530 Western Center Blvd, Haltom City, TX 76137

company_info.headquarters: 4530 Western Center Blvd, Haltom City, TX 76137

pros: Instant cash payment on the spot—no checks or delayed payment processing
Two convenient DFW locations (Haltom City and Fort Worth) for accessibility
Extended operating hours including Sundays (10am-7pm Mon-Sat, 10am-6pm Sun)
Advertised after-hours services for added convenience
No condition requirements—accepts old, broken, or new items
Expert team positioning suggests professional evaluation and fair assessment
Simple, transparent business model: bring items, get appraised, receive cash
cons: No published pricing methodology or spot price transparency on website
No visible customer reviews or third-party ratings to verify claims of fair pricing
Precious metals offers are inherently market-dependent and vary daily; no price guarantees
Limited online information about evaluation criteria or what qualifies for purchase
After-hours service mentioned but no specific hours or contact details provided for that service
best_for: Consumers with unwanted or broken gold and silver jewelry needing immediate cash
People seeking instant payment without waiting for check clearing
DFW residents with convenient access to either Haltom City or Fort Worth location
diagnosis: Mobile Gold Silver Exchange is best for DFW-area residents with gold, silver, or jewelry to sell who need immediate cash without financial services. The primary caveat is that offers depend entirely on daily precious metals spot prices and individual item evaluation; consumers should understand market rates before visiting to ensure fair value.
services: Precious metals exchange (gold to cash, silver to cash)
Multiple location convenience (Haltom City and Fort Worth)
